scores.notes: Company name mostly correct except minor spacing issue ('TA .K' vs 'TA .K'). Address has a wrong street number ('NO.51' vs 'NO.53') and a typo in 'JOHOR BAHRU' ('JOHOR BAHRI'). Date and total amount match exactly. Table structure partially preserved but includes extra unrelated lines and columns not in ground truth. Layout order mostly correct but includes extraneous cashier/member info and product details not in ground truth. Overall, most key info is present but with some errors and added unrelated content.
